panels.description: Identifies data that is sitting on the latent queue for processing.
panels.title: Latent Data

panels.description:
# Spark ingestion rate

Shows the total number of records received from RoadRunner (through Fedex), and the total number of records processed. These two number should be the same overtime on stable systems.

Discrepancies means that the spark job is getting behind.
panels.title: Spark Ingestion Rate

panels.description: Since each servers have a different number of CPU...

targets.expr: sum by (instance)  (irate(node_cpu{mode!="idle"}[5m]))/(count(count(node_cpu) without (mode)) by (instance)) or sum by (instance)  (irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode!="idle"}[5m]))/(count(count(node_cpu_seconds_total) without (mode)) by (instance))

panels.title: Overall CPU usage

targets.expr: sum by (instance) (irate(node_cpu{mode="iowait"}[5m]))/(count(count(node_cpu) without (mode)) by (instance)) or sum by (instance) (irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="iowait"}[5m]))/(count(count(node_cpu_seconds_total) without (mode)) by (instance))

panels.title: Druid Status check (/status/health) as reported by each servers

panels.description: When this is != 0, it means that either the coordinator / overlord think that some node is connected while it isn't, or some of the nodes think that are connected but coordinator or overlord don't know about it.
panels.title: Druid's overlord view of the cluster, compared to each individual servers (should always be 0)

options.content:
# Capture flows

Includes Clickhouse, Capture and related metrics

panels.title: PV Storage inserted Datasets to clickhouse (per CH nodes)

panels.description: We expect "No Data" here. If there are invalid datasets, there is an error
panels.title: Invalid datasets per pv-storage (Should be "No data points")
